referential_task.4.player.partner_commen: My partner gave an initial description of the basket, then I would ask for questions that helped narrow it down further if needed, then they would answer and help get it figured out. Over time we stuck to familiar terms that helped identify the basket like "apple-picking" or "house" or "heart".
referential_task.4.player.partner_human_: I think the speed at which they typed, which was relatively slow, and their typos as well as their ability to really get what I was talking about definitely solidified to me that they are a human. An AI would not have picked up on these small details of the baskets.
